abstracts.abstract: Increases monthly minimum benefit for a spouse, domestic partner, former spouse.

bill.title: AN ACT RELATING TO EDUCATION -- TEACHERS' RETIREMENT

posted_text:
👩‍🏫 Education
RI H7683 — Increases monthly minimum benefit for a spouse, domestic partner, former spouse.

This bill increases the minimum monthly benefit paid to a spouse, domestic partner, or former spouse of a Rhode Island teacher in the state's retirement system. The change applies to all eligible retirees.

June 22, 2026: Signed by Governor.
